artifact_diagnostics.geometry_cleanup_reason: V8.2 keeps raw/staging geometries immutable; label-mask, white-background, and hatch-grid holes may get a separate review-only cleaned candidate, never silent export.

methods_rejected.reason: Vektorové šrafy zatím nejsou spolehlivě izolované od ostatních bílých masek.
Tečky mohou být hranice, značky parcel nebo textové grafické prvky.
Bez uzavření hranice hrozí špatné rozdělení plochy.
Export bez ručního splitu by spojil oblasti s odlišnou plánovací semantikou.

method_rows.czech_explanation: Bere uzavřené plochy podle barvy výplně z PDF vektorů.
method_rows.main_risk: Stejná výplň může spojit šrafované i nešrafované oblasti.

method_rows.czech_explanation: Hledá šrafování/mřížku uvnitř plochy a zkouší ji oddělit jako samostatnou oblast.
method_rows.main_evidence: 0 bílých tenkých čar; 635 hatch-grid hole artifacts po sloučení
method_rows.main_risk: Vektorové šrafy zatím nejsou spolehlivě izolované od ostatních bílých masek.

method_rows.czech_explanation: Hledá tečkovanou nebo silnou hranici, která vymezuje změnovou plochu.
method_rows.main_risk: Tečky mohou být hranice, značky parcel nebo textové grafické prvky.

method_rows.czech_explanation: Hledá silné hranice, které mohou rozdělovat plánovací plochy.
method_rows.main_risk: Bez uzavření hranice hrozí špatné rozdělení plochy.

method_rows.czech_explanation: Přiřazuje popisky jako BX.p nebo Z.51a k nejbližší/obsahující ploše.
method_rows.main_risk: Popisek sám nerozděluje geometrii a může jen potvrdit ruční split.

method_rows.czech_explanation: Mapuje barvy a symboly z legendy na třídy ploch.
method_rows.main_risk: Legenda nerozděluje vnitřní šrafované části bez geometrické hranice.

method_rows.czech_explanation: Porovnává vektorovou extrakci s vykresleným obrázkem PDF stránky.
method_rows.main_evidence: Vykreslený plán slouží jako vizuální kontrola.
method_rows.main_risk: Raster je zatím pouze podpůrný důkaz, ne zdroj automatického splitu.

method_rows.czech_explanation: Automatika nestačí, plocha musí být ručně rozdělená nebo potvrzená.
method_rows.main_evidence: 1265 export-blocked polygonů; 875 polygonů s textovou/třídní kotvou; hatch/dot kandidáti: 635/83
method_rows.main_risk: Export bez ručního splitu by spojil oblasti s odlišnou plánovací semantikou.

expected_semantics: white-hatched region must be separable from same-red non-hatched fill
black dotted/thick boundary must be considered split evidence
BX.p / Z.51a text anchors must attach to the correct enclosed region
same fill color alone must not merge the semantic region with neighboring BX.c/BX.p areas
acceptance_checks: non-hatched same-fill area not merged into candidate region
export remains blocked unless confidence is high and review policy allows export

experiments.name: vector_hatch_line_premerge_index
experiments.hypothesis: White hatch/grid lines can be isolated before polygon merging.
experiments.result_summary: PDF drawing index did not expose target hatch as usable standalone white vector strokes.
experiments.learned: The Kamenice hatch signal is mostly preserved as post-merge hatch-grid hole artifacts, so vector-only pre-merge hatch detection is insufficient.

experiments.name: raster_hatch_grid_segmentation
experiments.hypothesis: Rendered page raster can reveal hatch/grid regions when vector strokes are not isolated.
experiments.result_summary: Raster/merged-hole evidence confirms hatch/grid presence but does not independently define an exact exportable split.
experiments.learned: Raster evidence is useful for locating hatch envelopes and must be combined with boundary/text evidence.

experiments.name: dotted_boundary_reconstruction
experiments.hypothesis: Black dots along the target region form a closed or near-closed split boundary.
experiments.result_summary: Dotted boundary candidates exist, but closure is not reliable enough for automatic export geometry.
experiments.learned: Dotted-boundary evidence should rank/shape review candidates, not silently cut final polygons.

experiments.name: thick_boundary_segmentation
experiments.hypothesis: Thicker/darker linework defines semantic area boundaries.
experiments.result_summary: Thick dark boundaries support the split hypothesis but do not provide a complete closed split graph.
experiments.learned: Thick boundaries are barrier evidence for hybrid scoring, not standalone geometry.

experiments.name: text_anchor_constrained_assignment
experiments.hypothesis: Text labels validate or assign split candidates but must not create geometry alone.
experiments.result_summary: Target labels are assignment/validation evidence only; they do not split same-fill geometry by themselves.
experiments.learned: Text anchors are kept as constraints for E06 and manual split payloads.

experiments.name: hybrid_graph_constrained_polygonization
experiments.hypothesis: Combine fill, hatch, boundary, text, and legend evidence in a review-only graph.
experiments.result_summary: Hybrid graph can produce a review-only ROI candidate, but confidence is not high enough for clean export.
experiments.learned: The best current method is evidence-combined review candidate generation with export blocked.

experiments.name: manual_split_fallback_schema
experiments.hypothesis: Ambiguous UP PDFs need first-class manual semantic split payloads.
experiments.result_summary: Manual split schema is available and linked to the target ROI evidence.
experiments.learned: Manual split remains the safe operational fallback for Kamenice.

experiments.name: synthetic_controls_and_regression_tests
experiments.hypothesis: Synthetic controls isolate each signal detector and prevent future Kamenice-only overfitting.
experiments.result_summary: Synthetic fixtures cover hatch, dotted, thick, text, label-mask, and real-void behavior.
experiments.learned: Keep synthetic controls as regression guardrails while Kamenice remains review-blocked.

properties.reason: review-only ROI candidate built from hatch, dotted/thick boundary, and text-anchor evidence; not export geometry

manual_split_fallbacks.reason: automatic hatch/dotted-boundary split is review-only and not reliable for clean export

algorithm_lab_result.best_current_method: E06 hybrid graph review-only candidate + E07 manual split fallback
remaining_blockers: dotted/thick boundary graph is not closed enough for automatic export geometry
raster hatch envelope supports review but cannot replace vector truth
text anchors validate candidate semantics but cannot split geometry alone
algorithm_lab_result.next_required_step: operator reviews ROI candidate and records manual_semantic_split child geometries if accepted
